title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with Vodka...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Over there! Check out that claw machine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka points toward a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know they made stuff like this! That's so
cool!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There're so many! And they've really captured
everyone's characteristics!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...Don't get the wrong idea, though. There's no
way I'd be interested in plushies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may say that, but Vodka seems clearly
interested in the claw machine.
choice_data_list: I could give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If you really wanna... I'll take any plushies off your
hands if ya win, so ya might as well give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
